posts.author: Gracia
posts.text:
The Pentium FDIV bug wasn’t some complex failure.

Five missing entries in a lookup table.
That’s it.

~1 in 9 billion divisions returned the wrong answer and it still triggered a recall.

posts.author: Gracia
posts.text:
Here’s what actually broke:
the division unit didn’t compute everything from scratch.

It used a lookup table to decide each step.
Miss an entry → wrong digit → remainder goes out of range → no recovery path.
